classes.name: CwmRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: inherits Qwen2RotaryEmbedding (same as LlamaRotaryEmbedding); standard NeoX-style RoPE with Llama3 scaling factor

classes.name: CwmAttention
classes.rationale: inherits Qwen2Attention; overrides only Q/K/V projections (no bias). Per-layer sliding/full attention via layer_types. Maps to LlamaAttention (which supports sliding window via gpt_oss_attention args + layer_types)

classes.name: CwmDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring class: composes CwmAttention + LlamaMLP + RMSNorm

classes.name: CwmModel
classes.rationale: wiring class: composes layers + final norm + RoPE + dual mask mapping

classes.name: DFineMLP
classes.rationale: DETR-style 2-layer MLP (Linear -> ReLU -> Linear); decomposes to L1/linear + L1/relu (no exact L2 file matches DFine's specialised version)

classes.name: DFineGate
classes.rationale: small gating block for layer-mixing; decomposes to L1/linear + L1/sigmoid + L1/layer_norm

classes.name: DFineFrozenBatchNorm2d
classes.rationale: frozen BN2d wrapper; FrozenBatchNorm2d L1 op covers the inference-time affine+running-stats compute

classes.name: DFineMultiscaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: multi-scale deformable attention sampling+aggregation, matches RT-DETRv2 L2 module structure (sampling_offsets/attn_weights/value_proj/output_proj + MultiScaleDeformableAttentionV2 core)

classes.name: DFineConvNormLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + activation; identical to RTDetrV2ConvNormLayer

classes.name: DFineRepVggBlock
classes.rationale: RepVGG block (3x3 + 1x1 + activation); identical to RTDetrV2

classes.name: DFineCSPRepLayer
classes.rationale: CSP RepVGG layer; same structure as RTDetrV2CSPRepLayer (uses RTDetrV2ConvNormLayer + RTDetrV2RepVggBlock)

classes.name: DFineRepNCSPELAN4
classes.rationale: ELAN-style block, novel to DFine; decomposes to RTDetrV2ConvNormLayer + RTDetrV2CSPRepLayer (no exact match)

classes.name: DFineSCDown
classes.rationale: depthwise+pointwise conv stride-2 downsampler; decomposes to L1/conv2d + L1/batch_norm2d

classes.name: DFineEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring class: same encoder layer as RTDetrV2 (self-attention + FFN + LN)

classes.name: DFineAIFILayer
classes.rationale: wiring class: AIFI uses RTDetrV2EncoderLayer with sinusoidal pos embed; composes

classes.name: DFineIntegral
classes.rationale: DFL integral over distribution; decomposes to L1/softmax + L1/linear (matmul)

classes.name: DFineLQE
classes.rationale: Localisation Quality Estimator MLP; decomposes to L1/linear + L1/relu

classes.name: DFineDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring class: composes self-attn (RTDetrV2MultiheadAttention) + cross-attn (DFineMultiscaleDeformableAttention) + FFN + Gate

classes.name: DFineMLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: wiring: stacked Linear+ReLU; covered by L2/rtdetrv2_layers.py

classes.name: DFineHybridEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: same hybrid encoder pattern as RT-DETRv2

classes.name: DFineModel
classes.rationale: wiring: ConvEncoder + HybridEncoder + Decoder, same skeleton as RT-DETRv2

classes.name: DabDetrFrozenBatchNorm2d
classes.rationale: FrozenBatchNorm2d L1 covers inference-time affine + buffered stats

classes.name: DabDetrConvEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: external timm/auto backbone; not a kb-nano kernel

classes.name: DabDetrSinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: no exact kb-nano file; sine-position computation is pure tensor ops (no kernel)

classes.name: DetrAttention
classes.rationale: encoder DETR-style separate Q/K/V no-RoPE attention with object_queries added to Q/K only; per LESSONS rule, decompose to L1/{linear, dense_attention, softmax}

classes.name: DabDetrAttention
classes.rationale: DAB-DETR ConditionalDetr-style attention with externally-provided Q/K/V (q,k include sine-pos concatenated 2D), output_proj only; decomposes to L1/{linear, bmm, softmax}

classes.name: DabDetrDecoderLayerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: wiring: separate content/pos query+key projections + DabDetrAttention + LN; composes

classes.name: DabDetrDecoderLayerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: wiring: cross-attn with concatenated content+sine query/key + DabDetrAttention(is_cross=True); composes

classes.name: DabDetrDecoderLayerFFN
classes.rationale: wiring: 2-layer FFN with LN; decomposes to L1/{layer_norm, linear, gelu/relu, dropout}

classes.name: DabDetrMLP
classes.rationale: stacked Linear+ReLU prediction head; decomposes to L1/{linear, relu}

classes.name: DabDetrDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring class: stacked decoder layers + reference-point/sine-embed bookkeeping

classes.name: DabDetrMHAttentionMap
classes.rationale: specialised attention map for segmentation; decomposes to L1/{linear, conv2d, softmax}

classes.name: Snake1d
classes.rationale: Snake activation x + (1/alpha)*sin(alpha*x)^2; no L1 op exists; decomposes to elementwise sin/multiply

classes.name: DacVectorQuantize
classes.rationale: VQ block: 1x1 Conv1d in_proj/out_proj + Embedding codebook + L2-normalize + nearest neighbor lookup

classes.name: DacResidualUnit
classes.rationale: wiring: 2 Conv1d (k=7 dilated, k=1) + Snake1d with weight_norm

classes.name: DacResidualVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of DacVectorQuantize for residual VQ

classes.name: Data2VecAudioAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-family encoder MHA: separate q_proj/k_proj/v_proj (no RoPE), eager_attention_forward; per LESSONS rule decompose to L1/{linear, dense_attention} (no specialised L2)

classes.name: Data2VecAudioFeedForward
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT + fc2 with dropout; decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu, dropout}

classes.name: Data2VecAudioEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: pos_conv_embed + LN + stacked encoder layers

classes.name: Data2VecAudioModel
classes.rationale: wiring: feature encoder + projection + encoder + adapter

classes.name: AMSoftmaxLoss
classes.rationale: loss module (training-only); decomposes to L1/{linear, softmax}

classes.name: TDNNLayer
classes.rationale: 1D convolution implemented via Linear over time-shifted slices; equivalent to Conv1d

classes.name: Data2VecTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style word+pos+token_type embeddings + LayerNorm; matches EncoderEmbeddingsBase pattern (XLM-R variant has create_position_ids_from_input_ids)

classes.name: Data2VecTextSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-family encoder self-attention: separate q/k/v/o Linear (bias), no RoPE, eager/SDPA dispatch; matches EncoderSelfAttention exactly

classes.name: Data2VecTextCrossAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-family cross-attention; same structure as SelfAttention with K/V from encoder_hidden_states. Per LESSONS, *CrossAttention paired with *SelfAttention uses same kb-nano file

classes.name: Data2VecTextAttention
classes.rationale: wiring class around Data2VecTextSelfAttention/CrossAttention + SelfOutput; per LESSONS rule, bare *Attention is composes

classes.name: Data2VecTextLayer
classes.rationale: wiring class: Attention + Intermediate + Output (BERT layer)

classes.name: Data2VecTextLMHead
classes.rationale: wiring: Linear + GELU + LN + decoder Linear

classes.name: Data2VecVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: patch embed + cls + optional pos embed; decomposes to L1/{conv2d, embedding}

classes.name: Data2VecVisionSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BEiT-style attention: q (bias) + k (no bias) + v (bias), with relative position bias added to scores; non-standard relative-bias compute, decomposes to L1/{linear, dense_attention, softmax} (no specialised L2)

classes.name: Data2VecVisionSdpaSelfAttention
classes.rationale: SDPA variant of SelfAttention with same projection layout; same decomposition

classes.name: Data2VecVisionSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout (residual handled outside); decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout}

classes.name: Data2VecVisionAttention
classes.rationale: wiring class around SelfAttention + SelfOutput (BEiT-style bare attention wrapper)

classes.name: Data2VecVisionOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout (no LN here, applied in Layer); decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout}

classes.name: Data2VecVisionLayer
classes.rationale: wiring class: pre-norm BEiT block with optional layer-scale (gamma_1, gamma_2)

classes.name: Data2VecVisionRelativePositionBias
classes.rationale: BEiT relative position bias table lookup; pure tensor ops (Embedding + indexing)

classes.name: Data2VecVisionEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stacked layers + optional shared relative pos bias

classes.name: Data2VecVisionPooler
classes.rationale: wiring: avg-pool + LN over patch tokens

classes.name: Data2VecVisionConvModule
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BN + activation; decomposes to L1/{conv2d, batch_norm2d, relu}

classes.name: Data2VecVisionUperHead
classes.rationale: wiring: UPerNet semantic-seg head with FPN + PSP

classes.name: DbrxAttention
classes.rationale: fused QKV via single Wqkv (Q + 2*KV chunks) + clip_qkv clamp + RoPE + GQA + out_proj. Closest match is LlamaAttention with QKVParallelLinear (no clip_qkv in kb-nano LlamaAttention; clip_qkv would need to be added or applied externally)

classes.name: DbrxExpertGLU
classes.rationale: single expert SwiGLU block stored as 3 stacked weight tensors (w1=gate, v1=up, w2=down) of shape [num_experts*ffn_hidden, hidden]; not a standard LlamaMLP. Used only inside DbrxExperts iteration

classes.name: DbrxExperts
classes.rationale: Mixtral-style per-expert iteration with one_hot expert mask + index_add output; closest kb-nano analogue is mixtral_moe.py / fused_experts.py (but DBRX stores w1/v1/w2 separately rather than gate_up packed)

classes.name: DbrxRouter
classes.rationale: single Linear gate over hidden_states; no e_score_correction_bias

classes.name: DbrxFFN
classes.rationale: wiring: router + experts + softmax + topk + optional norm

classes.name: DbrxNormAttentionNorm
classes.rationale: wiring: LN -> attn -> dropout+residual -> LN (returns dual states)

classes.name: DbrxModel
classes.rationale: wiring: wte + rotary_emb + stacked DbrxBlock + norm_f

classes.name: DebertaLayerNorm
classes.rationale: standard LayerNorm with eps inside sqrt; equivalent to L1/layer_norm.py (which uses torch.nn.functional.layer_norm)

classes.name: DebertaSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + DebertaLayerNorm(residual+x); decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout, layer_norm}

classes.name: DisentangledSelfAttention
classes.rationale: DeBERTa disentangled attention: fused in_proj for QKV + separate q_bias/v_bias + content-to-position (c2p) and position-to-content (p2c) relative attention biases. NOT standard; relative-position score uses pos_proj/pos_q_proj over rel_embeddings + torch.gather indexing. No kb-nano L2 covers this; decomposes to L1/{linear, softmax, dropout, bmm} plus custom relative-bias logic

classes.name: DebertaEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: word + (optional) position + (optional) token_type + DebertaLayerNorm + optional embed_proj

classes.name: DebertaIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT (configurable; usually GELU); matches EncoderIntermediate

classes.name: DebertaOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + DebertaLayerNorm(residual+x); decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout, layer_norm}

classes.name: DebertaLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: Attention + Intermediate + Output (with rel_embeddings/relative_pos extras)

classes.name: DebertaEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stacked layers + rel_embeddings buffer + LN

classes.name: DebertaV2SelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + LN; decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout, layer_norm}

classes.name: DisentangledSelfAttention
classes.rationale: DeBERTa-V2 disentangled self-attention with bucketed log-position rel-pos and 'p2c'/'c2p' biases; same family as v1 with refinements (separate query/key/value projections, share_att_key option). No kb-nano L2 covers this; decomposes to L1 ops + custom relative-bias compute

classes.name: ConvLayer
classes.rationale: 1D Conv + LN + dropout, applied after embedding (DeBERTa-V2 conv-augmented variant)

classes.name: DebertaV2Embeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: word + optional position + optional token_type + LN + optional embed_proj

classes.name: DebertaV2Encoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stacked layers + relative-pos embeddings + LN

classes.name: DecisionTransformerGPT2Attention
classes.rationale: GPT-2 style attention using Conv1D (==Linear with reversed weight layout) for fused QKV (c_attn) and out (c_proj). Causal mask, layer-idx scaling. Cross-attention variant uses separate q_attn/c_attn (KV). No kb-nano file; decomposes to L1/{linear, dense_attention, softmax, dropout}

classes.name: DecisionTransformerGPT2MLP
classes.rationale: GPT-2 Conv1D-Linear-Conv1D + ACT + dropout; decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu, dropout}

classes.name: DecisionTransformerGPT2Block
classes.rationale: wiring: LN + attention + LN + MLP, with optional cross-attn

classes.name: DecisionTransformerGPT2Model
classes.rationale: wiring: word + position embedding + stacked blocks + LN

classes.name: DecisionTransformerModel
classes.rationale: wiring: state/action/return embeddings + GPT2Model + state/action/return predictors

classes.name: DeepseekV2Experts
classes.rationale: inherits Qwen2MoeExperts; standard fused-MoE expert dispatch over n_routed_experts (gate_up_proj + down_proj packed per expert)

classes.name: DeepseekV2Moe
classes.rationale: DeepSeek MoE pattern: replicated gate (FP32 logits) + softmax/greedy or group_limited_greedy topk + n_shared_experts + routed_scaling_factor; matches DeepSeekMoE L2 module (which supports both topk methods via grouped_topk + GateLinear + shared_expert)

classes.name: DeepseekV2MLP
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaMLP; standard SwiGLU (gate_up + silu_and_mul + down)

classes.name: DeepseekV2RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: RoPE with YARN-style mscale via complex polar representation; routes to YarnRotaryEmbedding

classes.name: DeepseekV2Attention
classes.rationale: MLA: q_a_proj/q_a_layernorm/q_b_proj (or direct q_proj) + kv_a_proj_with_mqa/kv_a_layernorm/kv_b_proj + RoPE on rope subset; matches DeepSeekMLAAttention (V3.2 indexer disabled here, is_v32=False)

classes.name: DeepseekV3RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: YARN-style RoPE with mscale; routes to YarnRotaryEmbedding (DeepSeek-V3 uses deepseek_yarn rope_type)

classes.name: DeepseekV3MLP
classes.rationale: inherits Qwen2MoeMLP which is structurally LlamaMLP (gate_up + silu_and_mul + down)

classes.name: DeepseekV3TopkRouter
classes.rationale: FP32 router gate + e_score_correction_bias; group-limited noaux_tc topk; matches GroupedTopK + GateLinear used by DeepSeekMoE

classes.name: DeepseekV3NaiveMoe
classes.rationale: inherits MixtralExperts with DeepSeek's expert count + intermediate_size; standard fused-MoE

classes.name: DeepseekV3MoE
classes.rationale: shared experts + grouped routing + routed_scaling_factor post-experts; matches DeepSeekMoE exactly

classes.name: DeepseekV3Attention
classes.rationale: MLA with optional q-LoRA + kv compression + RoPE on rope-half (interleaved or NeoX); maps to DeepSeekMLAAttention

classes.name: DeepseekV4UnweightedRMSNorm
classes.rationale: RMSNorm without learnable weight (elementwise_affine=False); decomposes to L1/rms_norm.py with affine off (no exact L1 file but near-identical to RMSNorm with weight=None)

classes.name: DeepseekV4RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Multi-layer-type interleaved RoPE (Laguna pattern + per-rope-type buffers, no inv_freq doubling). No exact L1 match; decomposes to compute (inv_freq @ position_ids) per rope type

classes.name: DeepseekV4HCACache
classes.rationale: novel cache layer for HCA blocks (paper §2.3.2); not a kernel

classes.name: DeepseekV4CSACache
classes.rationale: cache layer (compressed-sparse) extending HCA cache; not a kernel

classes.name: DeepseekV4GroupedLinear
classes.rationale: grouped (block-diagonal) linear; novel, no kb-nano file. Decomposes to grouped matmul (could route to L1/sparse_mm or BMM)

classes.name: DeepseekV4HCACompressor
classes.rationale: novel V4 HCA compressor (sliding-window aggregation with position bias); no kb-nano L2 covers

classes.name: DeepseekV4Indexer
classes.rationale: DSA-style indexer for V4 sparse attention; closest match is SparseAttnIndexer used by DeepSeek-V3.2; semantics differ but same role

classes.name: DeepseekV4CSACompressor
classes.rationale: novel V4 CSA compressor; no kb-nano file

classes.name: DeepseekV4Attention
classes.rationale: Shared-KV MQA (single KV head broadcast) + partial RoPE + per-head attention sinks (gpt-oss style) + grouped low-rank output projection + 3 cache mechanisms (sliding/CSA/HCA). No existing kb-nano L2 covers this combination; would need a new MLA-like wrapper

classes.name: DeepseekV4HyperConnection
classes.rationale: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC, paper §2.2); novel residual streams with Sinkhorn-projection. No kb-nano file; decomposes to L1/{linear, sigmoid}

classes.name: DeepseekV4Experts
classes.rationale: GPT-OSS style swiglu_limit clamp + standard MoE dispatch; closest L2 is fused_experts.py with clamp added

classes.name: DeepseekV4TopKRouter
classes.rationale: sigmoid scoring + top-k with e_score_correction_bias; sigmoid_topk L1 op

classes.name: DeepseekV4HashRouter
classes.rationale: novel hash routing via tid2eid lookup; no kernel needed (table lookup)

classes.name: DeepseekV4SparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: gate (TopK or Hash) + Experts + shared_experts

classes.name: DeepseekV4DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: 2 HyperConnection blocks + Attention + (MLP or MoE)

classes.name: DeepseekVLAligner
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + Linear projector from vision encoder hidden_size to text hidden_size; decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}

classes.name: DeepseekVLModel
classes.rationale: wiring: AutoModel vision + aligner + AutoModel language (typically LLaMA + SiglipVisionModel). Vision attention -> L2/siglip_attention.py; LLM attention -> L2/attention.py via the underlying configs

classes.name: DeepseekVLSamVisionNeck
classes.rationale: inherits SamVisionNeck; Conv2d + LN(channels-first) + Conv2d + LN(channels-first)

classes.name: DeepseekVLSamVisionProj
classes.rationale: wiring: 2x (Conv2d + LN + GELU) projector for high-res vision branch

classes.name: DeepseekVLHybridAligner
classes.rationale: wiring: separate low-res and high-res projectors then concatenate; decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}

classes.name: DeepseekVLHybridModel
classes.rationale: wiring: SigLIP vision_model + SAM-style high_res_vision_model + dual aligner + LLM

classes.name: MultiScaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: multi-scale deformable attention sampling+aggregation primitive (grid_sample-based); kb-nano's MultiScaleDeformableAttentionV2 covers this

classes.name: DeformableDetrConvEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: external timm/auto backbone with replace_batch_norm

classes.name: DeformableDetrSinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: sine 2D position embedding; pure tensor ops, no kernel

classes.name: DeformableDetrLearnedPositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: learned 2D position embedding via Embedding lookups

classes.name: DeformableDetrSelfAttention
classes.rationale: inherits DetrSelfAttention (encoder pre-RoPE separate Q/K/V no-RoPE with object_queries added to Q/K); decomposes to L1/{linear, dense_attention, softmax}

classes.name: DeformableDetrMultiscaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: wraps MultiScaleDeformableAttention with sampling_offsets + attention_weights + value_proj + output_proj; matches RTDetrV2MultiscaleDeformableAttention

classes.name: DeformableDetrMLP
classes.rationale: fc1+ACT+fc2 (DETR-style); decomposes to L1/{linear, relu/gelu, dropout}

classes.name: DeformableDetrEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: deformable self-attn + LN + MLP + LN

classes.name: DeformableDetrMLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: stacked Linear+ReLU; decomposes to L1/{linear, relu}

classes.name: Deimv2SwiGLUFFN
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaMLP; SwiGLU MLP for Deimv2 SwiGLU branch

classes.name: Deimv2Gate
classes.rationale: wiring: layer-mixing gate; same as DFineGate

classes.name: Deimv2MultiscaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: inherits DFine deformable attention; same compute

classes.name: Deimv2CSPRepLayer
classes.rationale: Deimv2 variant of CSP RepVGG layer; same building blocks as RT-DETRv2

classes.name: Deimv2RepNCSPELAN5
classes.rationale: ELAN-style block, novel; decomposes to ConvNormLayer + CSPRepLayer

classes.name: Deimv2SpatialTuningAdapter
classes.rationale: novel spatial-tuning adapter; decomposes to L1/{conv2d, batch_norm2d, activation}

classes.name: Deimv2DINOv3ConvEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: DINOv3 ViT or ConvNeXt as feature backbone

classes.name: Deimv2Integral
classes.rationale: DFL integral; decomposes to L1/{softmax, linear}

classes.name: DeiTEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: PatchEmbeddings + cls_token + distillation_token + position_embeddings + dropout

classes.name: DeiTSelfAttention
classes.rationale: ViT-family attention: separate q/k/v Linear (qkv_bias), no RoPE, eager/SDPA dispatch with non-causal mask. Identical structure to BERT-style EncoderSelfAttention (separate Q/K/V Linear with bias)

classes.name: DeiTSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout (residual handled in DeiTLayer); decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout}

classes.name: DeiTAttention
classes.rationale: wiring class around DeiTSelfAttention + DeiTSelfOutput (BEiT-style bare attention wrapper); per LESSONS rule, bare *Attention is composes

classes.name: DeiTOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout (residual handled in Layer); decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout}

classes.name: DeiTLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm DeiT block (LN -> Attention -> residual; LN -> MLP -> residual)

classes.name: DepthAnythingReassembleLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + ConvTranspose2d/Conv2d for resampling vision features to feature-map resolution

classes.name: DepthAnythingPreActResidualLayer
classes.rationale: ReLU + Conv2d + BN + ReLU + Conv2d + BN residual block

classes.name: DepthAnythingDepthEstimationHead
classes.rationale: wiring: Conv + interpolate + Conv + Sigmoid head

classes.name: DepthProPatchEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: external DINOv2 ViT backbone applied to multi-scale image patches

classes.name: DepthProImageEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: external DINOv2 ViT backbone applied to full image

classes.name: DepthProPreActResidualLayer
classes.rationale: ReLU + Conv2d + ReLU + Conv2d residual block

classes.name: DepthProFovEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: smaller-resolution DINOv2 ViT backbone for FoV regression

classes.name: DepthProFovHead
classes.rationale: wiring: Conv + Linear head for FoV

classes.name: DepthProDepthEstimationHead
classes.rationale: wiring: Conv + interpolate + Conv depth-estimation head

classes.name: DetrSinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: sine 2D position embedding; pure tensor ops

classes.name: DetrLearnedPositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: learned 2D position embedding via Embedding lookups

classes.name: DetrSelfAttention
classes.rationale: DETR encoder attention: separate q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj (with bias) + add position_embeddings to query+key only (not value), eager dispatch + dense_attention. Per LESSONS rule, decompose to L1/{linear, dense_attention}

classes.name: DetrCrossAttention
classes.rationale: DETR cross-attention: query_pos to Q only, encoder_position_embeddings to K only, no pos to V; decomposes the same way as SelfAttention. Per LESSONS, *CrossAttention paired with *SelfAttention uses same kb-nano file

classes.name: DetrMLP
classes.rationale: fc1+ACT+dropout+fc2+dropout; decomposes to L1/{linear, relu/gelu, dropout}

classes.name: DetrMaskHeadSmallConv
classes.rationale: wiring: stacked Conv blocks for segmentation mask head

classes.name: DetrMHAttentionMap
classes.rationale: specialised attention map for segmentation; decomposes to L1/{linear, conv2d, softmax}

classes.name: DetrMLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: stacked Linear+ReLU; decomposes to L1/{linear, relu}

classes.name: DiaMultiChannelEmbedding
classes.rationale: summed multi-codebook Embedding lookups (TTS audio token channels)

classes.name: DiaMLP
classes.rationale: inherits Phi3MLP which is structurally LlamaMLP (gate_up + silu_and_mul + down)

classes.name: DiaSelfAttention
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaAttention; encoder is_causal=False, decoder is_causal=True. Uses separate q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj (no bias). scaling=1 (custom), GQA-capable

classes.name: DiaCrossAttention
classes.rationale: encoder-decoder cross-attention: separate q_proj (from hidden) + k_proj/v_proj (from cross_hidden_size) + o_proj. Uses EncoderDecoderCache for one-time KV write. Per LESSONS rule, decomposes to L1/{linear, dense_attention, store_kvcache} (no specialised L2 covers)

classes.name: DiaEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: embedding + stacked encoder layers + LN + RoPE

classes.name: DiaDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre_sa_norm + SelfAttention(causal) + pre_ca_norm + CrossAttention + pre_mlp_norm + MLP

classes.name: DiffLlamaAttention
classes.rationale: Differential Transformer attention: doubles num_heads internally (chunks V, computes attn twice with same Q,K but two halves of V), scales by lambda_full = exp(q1*k1) - exp(q2*k2) + lambda_init, then groupnorm with weightless RMSNorm(2*head_dim). NOT a standard attention. Decomposes to L1/{linear, dense_attention} but with subtraction of two attention outputs and groupnorm scaling. No kb-nano L2 covers DiffTransformer

classes.name: DiffLlamaFlashAttention2
classes.rationale: FA2 variant of DiffLlamaAttention; same algo with two _flash_attention_forward calls

classes.name: DiffLlamaSdpaAttention
classes.rationale: SDPA variant of DiffLlamaAttention; same algo via single SDPA + chunk subtraction

classes.name: DiffLlamaForCausalLM
classes.rationale: wiring class (note: inherits GemmaForCausalLM, not LlamaForCausalLM, due to logit-softcapping pattern)

classes.name: NeighborhoodAttention
classes.rationale: Dilated NATTEN neighborhood attention with relative position bias; requires natten library natten2dav/natten2dqkrpb. NO kb-nano kernel covers this; would need a NATTEN op

classes.name: NeighborhoodAttentionOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout output projection; decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout}

classes.name: DinatOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout (no LN); decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout}

classes.name: DinatLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm Dinat block (LN -> NeighborhoodAttention -> DropPath; LN -> MLP)

classes.name: Dinov2Embeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: PatchEmbeddings + cls_token + position_embeddings + dropout (with interpolation)

classes.name: Dinov2SelfAttention
classes.rationale: ViT-style SelfAttention: separate q/k/v Linear (qkv_bias), no RoPE, eager/SDPA dispatch with non-causal. Same structure as BERT EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: Dinov2SelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout (no LN); decomposes to L1/{linear, dropout}

classes.name: Dinov2Attention
classes.rationale: wiring class around SelfAttention + SelfOutput; per LESSONS rule, bare *Attention is composes

classes.name: Dinov2LayerScale
classes.rationale: elementwise multiply by learned lambda1 vector; pure tensor op

classes.name: Dinov2MLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT (GELU) + fc2; decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}. Note: NOT LlamaMLP - this is 2-layer fc+act+fc, not SwiGLU

classes.name: Dinov2SwiGLUFFN
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP: weights_in (gate||value packed) + chunk + silu*gate + weights_out. Matches SwiGLUMlp pattern (separate fc1_g and fc1_x in kb-nano vs single fused weights_in here)

classes.name: Dinov2Layer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm DINOv2 block with LayerScale + DropPath

classes.name: DINOv3ConvNextLayerNorm
classes.rationale: LayerNorm with channels-first option for 4D tensors; matches LayerNorm2d L1 op

classes.name: DINOv3ConvNextLayer
classes.rationale: ConvNeXt block: depthwise 7x7 Conv2d + LayerNorm + 1x1 Linear (pwconv1) + GELU + 1x1 Linear (pwconv2) + LayerScale + DropPath

classes.name: DINOv3ConvNextStage
classes.rationale: wiring: optional downsample (LN+Conv2d k=2 s=2) + stacked ConvNextLayer

classes.name: DINOv3ViTEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: Conv2d patch_embeddings + cls_token + register_tokens + mask_token (NO learned absolute pos embed; uses RoPE instead)

classes.name: DINOv3ViTRopePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: DINOv3 2D RoPE based on patch center coordinates; matches kb-nano's L1/dinov3_rope.py exactly (2D RoPE producing cos/sin for [-1,+1] patch centers)

classes.name: DINOv3ViTAttention
classes.rationale: MHA with separate q/k/v Linear + RoPE applied only to patch tokens (cls/register exempt) + non-causal SDPA. Matches EvaAttention which supports num_prefix_tokens for cls/register and apply_rot_embed_cat (kb-nano's DINOv3 7B L4 uses this)

classes.name: DINOv3ViTMLP
classes.rationale: inherits ArceeMLP (gated SiLU MLP); decomposes to L1/{linear, silu}. NOTE: ArceeMLP is a SwiGLU variant not present in kb-nano outside LlamaMLP form

classes.name: DINOv3ViTGatedMLP
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaMLP; gated SwiGLU MLP for DINOv3 ViT-7B variant

classes.name: DINOv3ViTLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm + Attention + LayerScale + DropPath + LN + (MLP or GatedMLP) + LayerScale + DropPath. Matches EvaBlock

classes.name: DINOv3ViTModel
classes.rationale: wiring: Embeddings + RopePositionEmbedding + Encoder + LN + cls pooler. Matches kb-nano L4/dinov3.py top-level

classes.name: Embeddings
classes.rationale: word + position Embedding + LN + Dropout (no token_type); same family as BertEmbeddings

classes.name: DistilBertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-family encoder MHA with separate q_lin/k_lin/v_lin/out_lin Linear (with bias), eager/SDPA dispatch, non-causal. Matches EncoderSelfAttention exactly (only naming differs: q_lin vs query)

classes.name: FFN
classes.rationale: Linear (lin1) + activation + Linear (lin2) + Dropout; same as EncoderIntermediate+EncoderOutput pattern (without LN+residual which is done in TransformerBlock)
